name: Mission Community Fridge Network
mission: Keeps six 24/7 community fridges stocked with free fresh food for anyone who needs it.

name: Golden Gate Neighborhood Food Bank
mission: Distributes weekly grocery boxes to 400+ families and runs a Saturday farmers-market rescue program.

name: Sunset Supper Club
mission: Cooks and delivers hot meals to homebound seniors three nights a week.
needs: meal companions who stay to chat

name: Bayview Urban Harvest
mission: Grows produce on three reclaimed lots and gives every pound away at a weekly free farm stand.

name: Haven House SF
mission: Runs a 60-bed shelter with job counseling and a mail service for unhoused neighbors.

name: Tenant Power Legal Clinic
mission: Free walk-in clinic helping renters fight evictions and understand their rights.

name: SoMa Street Outreach Collective
mission: Walks nightly routes bringing water, socks, first aid, and referrals to neighbors sleeping outside.

name: The Welcome Home Project
mission: Furnishes empty apartments for families exiting shelters, using donated furniture and volunteer movers.

name: Ocean Beach Cleanup Brigade
mission: Hosts twice-monthly beach cleanups and tracks debris data for city advocacy.

name: Friends of the Panhandle
mission: Plants and cares for street trees and native gardens along the Panhandle corridor.

name: Alemany Community Garden Alliance
mission: Maintains 80 garden plots and teaches free composting and growing workshops.

name: 826 Story Lab
mission: Free drop-in writing and homework help for students aged 8-18, plus publishing projects.

name: CodeBridge SF
mission: Weekend coding classes and laptop lending for high schoolers from under-resourced schools.

name: Reading Partners Richmond
mission: One-on-one reading tutoring for K-4 students reading below grade level.

name: Little Brothers - Friends of the Elderly SF
mission: Matches volunteers with isolated seniors for monthly visits, calls, and holiday celebrations.

name: Tech & Tea Time
mission: Drop-in sessions where volunteers help seniors with phones, scam avoidance, and video calls to family.

name: Meals with Elders
mission: Pairs volunteers with seniors for weekly shared lunches - half meal delivery, half friendship.

name: SF Animal Care Friends
mission: Support crew for the city shelter: dog walking, cat socializing, and adoption event staffing.

name: Foster Tails Network
mission: Recruits and supports foster homes for kittens, seniors dogs, and pets of hospitalized owners.

name: Pets of the Park Pantry
mission: Free pet food, leashes, and vet-day events for pets of unhoused and low-income neighbors.
